ecuparam.name: AEM Post-Turbo Lambda (D2WD610H)*
ecuparam.desc: E500-D2WD610H hybrid-O2 patch value at FFFFB098. AEM 30-0310 post-turbo lambda for logging only; 0.0 means the reconstructed controller output is outside the configured voltage window. An open ECU input can sit at the stock rear-O2 bias voltage and must not be assumed to produce 0.0.

ecuparam.name: AEM Input Raw ADC (D2WD610H)*
ecuparam.desc: E501-Raw unsigned 16-bit ADC count at FFFFAB20 for the repurposed RH rear-O2 input. Use this only to calibrate and diagnose the external conditioner; it is not lambda and it does not control fueling.
